name: Lemon Raspberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Frozen raspberries should be unsweetened and not thawed.
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Line a 12-cup muffin pan with paper liners.
2. Sift flour into a bowl; stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together half-and-half, vegetable oil, lemon extract, and eggs until well blended.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients; mix just until moistened.
5. Fold in the raspberries (fresh or thawed frozen).
6. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
7. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 18-23 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
